arts.ttl: IAN HERBERT: Man United have waited SO long for Man City's kingdom to crumble. But here's the agonising truth for Ruben Amorim's side as they look to exploit Pep Guardiola's faltering champions
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT: A time, 20 years ago, when Manchester seemed to be struggling as much as its two football teams, who met at Old Trafford on the first Sunday in November.

arts.ttl: Premier League injury table shows there are SIX teams who have had it worse than 'in-crisis' Man City this season as Pep Guardiola bemoans absentees... so, which club sits top?
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's side have won just one of their last 10 games, losing seven and are fourth in the Premier League table. Respectable - but they are currently looking over their shoulders.

arts.sum: Jeremie Frimpong's representatives held talks with Man Utd last year before the club ultimately signed Noussair Mazraoui from Bayern Munich last summer.
